channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two potholes close together on the line dividing lane one and lane two, 8th May
item.description:
Two potholes close together on the line dividing lane one and lane two , on the roundabout, on the west side, adjacent to Longlevens. Could they be reviewed and ideally repaired please ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 8th May
item.description:
Railway Bridge sign fallen off. Has been collected by crew on E70013494. Will need reattaching
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Massive dangerous potholes, 8th May
item.description:
You really can't miss it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath sign rusted and leaning, 8th May
item.description:
At the corner of Pirton Lane and small lane by the railway bridge. Next to the red telephone box in the corner of the garden of Browbridge, Pirton Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign structurally damaged/leaning more than 20 degrees/loose in ground (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Dog fouling, 8th May
item.description:
Outside number 23
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Utilities work unsafe and unfinished, 8th May
item.description:
On the cycle path crossing hill court road. There is a section that had been dug up. The utilities cover is loose or rattles and the green grip paving has not been reinstated. This has been since the contractors put in the covering and the path has not had the finishing required. The utilities cover is getting looser and it will cause an issue or accident for a cyclist if it isn't sorted.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Hill Court Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign/waymarker is damaged problem, 8th May
item.description:
The post has fallen down and is now in the hedge
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: As we come out of Beech Close, we struggle to see cars on the right hand side and if we pull forward we usually have near misses if cars are on coming, 8th May
item.description:
The junction of Beech Close with Noverton Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Noverton Lane, Noverton, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain hole sunk leaving deep drop, 8th May
item.description:
The drain is near the bridge heading towards Swindon Village on the left hand side of the road, away from Spirax Zarco and Runnings road. It is deep enough for cars to have to swerve onto the other side of the road to avoid the drop as it would cause suspension damage. This has been the case for over a week and looks like the drain is sinking lower. It is dangerous for bicycles and motorcycles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree, 8th May
item.description:
Large tree overhanging road/crescent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anlaby Court, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 8th May
item.description:

item.title: Rookery road park - rubbish everywhere, 8th May
item.description:
Rubbish littered all through the park due to bins not being emptied/overflow. Antisocial behaviour has also involved a Tesco trolley being placed onto the children’s roundabout so unable to use.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
CWPH 800 x 300 x 45mm Road Closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th May

item.title: Large wooden planter full of weeds. Either it should be removed as an unsightly obstruction on the pavement or it should be planted and maintained. Thanks, 8th May
item.description:
Opposite The Bank House Wetherspoons in Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15-21, Clarence Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
